chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-467 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Non-Prosecution 21-05-2024 Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for respondents No. 1&5. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G. ***** None present for the applicant. No intimation is received so far. Even on the last date of hearing, counsel for applicant sought time for compliance of office objections within a week, but to no avail. Accordingly, this Crl. Misc. Application along with pending application(s) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Ahmad
